prompt: Using the provided reference image as a loose layout inspiration for a model-comparison graphic, replace the Japanese DX infographic with a clean 2×2 comparison collage of photorealistic eyeglasses store interiors. Create exactly 4 panels: top-left labeled GPT-Image-2, top-right labeled GPT-Image-1.5, bottom-left labeled MAI Image 2 Efficient, and bottom-right labeled Flux.2 Flex. Each panel should show a different upscale optical boutique interior filled with wall displays of eyeglass frames, glass counters, warm lighting, wood cabinetry, mirrors, and showroom depth. Use small horizontal orange label bars with black text near the left side of each panel. Make the final image a wide 16:9 collage with thin panel boundaries, no extra explanatory text, no Japanese report content, and no watermark.
